samples.xml_description:
<module id="multi_8bit">
    <description>Implement an 8-bit multiplier based on shifting and adding.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="A" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input operand A (multiplicand).</input>
        <input id="B" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input operand B (multiplier).</input>
        <output id="product" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit output product.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <enum id="shift" value="[1:0]">
            <item>NO_SHIFT</item>
            <item>SHIFT_1</item>
            <item>SHIFT_2</item>
            <item>SHIFT_3</item>
        </enum>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" width_description="[15:0]" id="product_nxt">16-bit product.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" width_description="[15:0]" id="add_nxt">16-bit register for addition.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" width_description="[7:0]" id="shift_1_nxt">Register for shifted value.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" width_description="[7:0]" id="shift_2_nxt">Register for shifted value.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" width_description="[7:0]" id="shift_3_nxt">Register for shifted value.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" width_description="[1:0]" id="shift_cnt_nxt">Shift count.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="done_nxt">Done signal.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="add_c_nxt">Carry out from addition.</reg>
        <enum id="shift">Shift value.</enum>
        <enum id="shift_cnt">Shift count.</enum>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <enum_case id="shift">SHIFT_1</enum_case>
        <enum_case id="shift_cnt">SHIFT_1</enum_case>
        <enum_case id="shift">SHIFT_2</enum_case>
        <enum_case id="shift_cnt">SHIFT_2</enum_case>
        <enum_case id="shift">SHIFT_3</enum_case>
        <enum_case id="shift_cnt">SHIFT_3</enum_case>
        <default_case>
            <enum_case id="shift">NO_SHIFT</enum_case>
        </default_case>
        <always @(*), @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n)>
            if (~rst_n) begin
                product_nxt = 16'b0;
                add_nxt = 16'b0;
                shift_1_nxt = 8'b0;
                shift_2_nxt = 8'b0;
                shift_3_nxt = 8'b0;
                shift_cnt_nxt = 2'b0;
                done_nxt = 1'b0;
                add_c_nxt = 1'b0;
            end
            else begin
                if (done_nxt == 1'b1) begin
                    product_nxt = product_nxt;
                    add_nxt = 16'b0;
                    shift_1_nxt = 8'b0;
                    shift_2_nxt = 8'b0;
                    shift_3_nxt = 8'b0;
                    shift_cnt_nxt = 2'b0;
                    done_nxt = 1'b1;
                    add_c_nxt = 1'b0;
                end
                else begin
                    if (shift_cnt_nxt == 2'b0) begin
                        product_nxt = 16'b0;
                        add_nxt = 16'b0;
                        shift_1_nxt = A;
                        shift_2_nxt = A;
                        shift_3_nxt = A;
                        shift_cnt_nxt = shift_cnt_nxt + 2'b1;
                        done_nxt = 1'b0;
                        add_c_nxt = 1'b0;
                    end
                    else if (shift_cnt_nxt == SHIFT_1) begin
                        if (B[0] == 1'b1) begin
                            add_nxt = {8'b0, shift_1_nxt};
                        end
                        else begin
                            add_nxt = 16'b0;
                        end
                        shift_1_nxt = shift_1_nxt << 1;
                        shift_2_nxt = shift_2_nxt << 2;
                        shift_3_nxt = shift_3_nxt << 3;
                        shift_cnt_nxt = shift_cnt_nxt + 2'b1;
                        done_nxt = 1'b0;
                        add_c_nxt = 1'b0;
                    end
                    else if (shift_cnt_nxt == SHIFT_2) begin
                        if (B[1] == 1'b1) begin
                            add_nxt = {7'b0, shift_2_nxt, 1'b0};
                        end
                        else begin
                            add_nxt = 16'b0;
                        end
                        shift_1_nxt = shift_1_nxt << 1;
                        shift_2_nxt = shift_2_nxt << 2;
                        shift_3_nxt = shift_3_nxt << 3;
                        shift_cnt_nxt = shift_cnt_nxt + 2'b1;
                        done_nxt = 1'b0;
                        add_c_nxt = 1'b0;
                    end
                    else if (shift_cnt_nxt == SHIFT_3) begin
                        if (B[2] == 1'b1) begin
                            add_nxt = {6'b0, shift_3_nxt, 2'b0};
                        end
                        else begin
                            add_nxt = 16'b0;
                        end
                        shift_1_nxt = shift_1_nxt << 1;
                        shift_2_nxt = shift_2_nxt << 2;
                        shift_3_nxt = shift_3_nxt << 3;
                        shift_cnt_nxt = shift_cnt_nxt + 2'b1;
                        done_nxt = 1'b0;
                        add_c_nxt = 1'b0;
                    end
                    else if (shift_cnt_nxt == 2'b111) begin
                        if (B[3] == 1'b1) begin
                            add_nxt = {5'b0, shift_1_nxt, 3'b0};
                        end
                        else begin
                            add_nxt = 16'b0;
                        end
                        shift_1_nxt = shift_1_nxt << 1;
                        shift_2_nxt = shift_2_nxt << 2;
                        shift_3_nxt = shift_3_nxt << 3;
                        shift_cnt_nxt = shift_cnt_nxt + 2'b1;
                        done_nxt = 1'b0;
                        add_c_nxt = 1'b0;
                    end
                    else if (shift_cnt_nxt == 2'b1000) begin
                        if (B[4] == 1'b1) begin
                            add_nxt = {4'b0, shift_1_nxt, 4'b0};
                        end
                        else begin
                            add_nxt = 16'b0;
                        end
                        shift_1_nxt = shift_1_nxt << 1;
                        shift_2_nxt = shift_2_nxt << 2;
                        shift_3_nxt = shift_3_nxt << 3;
                        shift_cnt_nxt = shift_cnt_nxt + 2'b1;
                        done_nxt = 1'b0;
                        add_c_nxt = 1'b0;
                    end
                    else if (shift_cnt_nxt == 2'b1001) begin
                        if (B[5] == 1'b1) begin
                            add_nxt = {3'b0, shift_1_nxt, 5'b0};
                        end
                        else begin
                            add_nxt = 16'b0;
                        end
                        shift_1_nxt = shift_1_nxt << 1;
                        shift_2_nxt = shift_2_nxt << 2;
                        shift_3_nxt = shift_3_nxt << 3;
                        shift_cnt_nxt = shift_cnt_nxt + 2'b1;
                        done_nxt = 1'b0;
                        add_c_nxt = 1'b0;
                    end
                    else if (shift_cnt_nxt == 2'b1010) begin
                        if (B[6] == 1'b1) begin
                            add_nxt = {2'b0, shift_1_nxt, 6'b0};
                        end
                        else begin
                            add_nxt = 16'b0;
                        end
                        shift_1_nxt = shift_1_nxt << 1;
                        shift_2_nxt = shift_2_nxt << 2;
                        shift_3_nxt = shift_3_nxt << 3;
                        shift_cnt_nxt = shift_cnt_nxt + 2'b1;
                        done_nxt = 1'b0;
                        add_c_nxt = 1'b0;
                    end
                    else if (shift_cnt_nxt == 2'b1011) begin
                        if (B[7] == 1'b
samples.tb_log:

                                  : ... In instance multi_8bit
   14 |         partial_products[i] = (B[i]) ? (A << i) : 16'b0;
